title: The Tom & Jerry Show
desc: Tom the cat gets up to all sorts of misadventures as he pursues Jerry the mouse.

title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
desc: After senior year, the Scooby-Doo gang spend their last summer break by solving mysteries.

title: Scooby-Doo and Scrappy-Doo
desc: A detective canine possessing a timid disposition, Scooby-Doo trembles in secluded nooks.

title: Codename: Kids Next Door
desc: Five heroic 10-year-olds have formed a secret team to free kids from the rule of adults.

title: Batman Animated Series
desc: Bruce Wayne masks his identity as Batman, a vigilante detective who defends Gotham City.
